<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Fixing js syntax**

I found invalid Hugo comment syntax `{ {/* Mobile TOC toggle functionality */ } }` inside JavaScript that could break rendering. I found that `{ {/* Mobile TOC toggle functionality */ } }` in JS is invalid Hugo syntax and will break rendering. 

I confirmed that `{ {/* Mobile TOC toggle functionality */ } }` renders as broken JS `{ }` and needs to be removed. I confirmed that `{ }` is valid JS and harmless as an empty block statement. </details></think>
